description: This video introduces Anchor, a framework for building Solana programs, by converting a hello World program from the Solana program Crate to Anchor format. It covers key differences in code structure, including the use of context structs and IDLs for instruction data management.
topic_summary: Introduction to Anchor framework for Solana programming, highlighting code conversion from Solana program Crate to Anchor, and explaining key structural differences.
